head:
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>${TITLE@LOCALIZED_STRING_SS}</title>
<meta name="description" content="${META_DESCRIPTION@LOCALIZED_STRING_SS}">
<link rel="icon" href="/core/image/${HERO_FLOAT_IMAGE@IMAGE}/get" type="image/png" />
<script defer src="/core/api/media-asset/${DYNAMIC_FORM_JS@ASSET}/get/dynamic-form.min.js"></script>
<style>
:root{--vl-ink:#10151f;--vl-muted:#5f6d7a;--vl-line:#d9e4ee;--vl-ice:#edf6fb;--vl-frost:#f7fbfd;--vl-blue:#176bff;--vl-cyan:#2ed3ff;--vl-navy:#12243a;--vl-white:#fff;--vl-radius:28px;--vl-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(18,36,58,.14);--vl-container:1180px}
*{box-sizing:border-box}html{scroll-behavior:smooth}body{margin:0;font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif;color:var(--vl-ink);background:var(--vl-frost);line-height:1.5}img{display:block;max-width:100%;height:auto}a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}button,input,textarea,select{font:inherit}.vl-page{overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f7fbfd 0%,#fff 38%,#eef8ff 100%);isolation:isolate}.vl-container{width:min(var(--vl-container),calc(100% - 40px));margin:0 auto}.vl-section{padding:96px 0;position:relative}.vl-eyebrow{margin:0 0 14px;color:var(--vl-blue);font-size:13px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase}.vl-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,68px);line-height:.98;letter-spacing:0;font-weight:850}.vl-section-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,54px);line-height:1.04;letter-spacing:0;font-weight:820}.vl-text{color:var(--vl-muted);font-size:18px;margin:18px 0 0}.vl-button{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:54px;padding:0 24px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid transparent;font-weight:800;transition:transform .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease,background .2s ease}.vl-button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 16px 38px rgba(23,107,255,.22)}.vl-button--primary{color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--vl-blue),#00a8ff)}.vl-button--secondary{color:var(--vl-navy);background:rgba(255,255,255,.84);border-color:rgba(18,36,58,.14)}.vl-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);border:1px solid rgba(18,36,58,.1);border-radius:var(--vl-radius);box-shadow:var(--vl-shadow)}
.vl-header{position:fixed;inset:18px 0 auto;z-index:20;pointer-events:none}.vl-nav{pointer-events:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;min-height:68px;padding:10px 14px 10px 22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);border:1px solid rgba(18,36,58,.1);border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 18px 50px rgba(18,36,58,.1);backdrop-filter:blur(20px)}.vl-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-weight:900;font-size:20px;color:var(--vl-navy)}.vl-logo-mark{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:12px;display:grid;place-items:center;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--vl-blue),var(--vl-cyan))}.vl-nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;color:#3f4c5d;font-weight:700;font-size:14px}.vl-header-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.vl-hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;z-index:0;min-height:930px;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:150px 0 90px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%,rgba(46,211,255,.26),transparent 32%),linear-gradient(180deg,#edf8ff,#f8fcff)}.vl-hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.88fr) minmax(420px,1.12fr);align-items:center;gap:46px}.vl-hero-copy{position:relative;z-index:2}.vl-hero-copy .vl-text{max-width:590px;font-size:20px}.vl-hero-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;margin-top:34px}.vl-hero-metrics{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:38px;max-width:610px}.vl-metric{padding:18px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);border:1px solid rgba(18,36,58,.1)}.vl-metric strong{display:block;font-size:28px;line-height:1;color:var(--vl-navy)}.vl-metric span{display:block;margin-top:8px;color:var(--vl-muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.vl-hero-media{position:relative;z-index:1;isolation:isolate;min-height:620px}.vl-hero-photo{position:absolute;z-index:1;inset:58px 0 0 36px;border-radius:36px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 36px 90px rgba(18,36,58,.24)}.vl-hero-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.vl-loader-cutout{position:absolute;z-index:3;right:0;bottom:-22px;width:min(58%,470px);filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 36px rgba(18,36,58,.24))}.vl-weather-pill{position:absolute;z-index:4;left:0;top:0;width:240px;padding:18px;border-radius:26px;color:var(--vl-navy);background:rgba(255,255,255,.86);border:1px solid rgba(18,36,58,.1);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(18,36,58,.14)}.vl-weather-pill strong{font-size:38px;line-height:1}
.vl-trust{padding:42px 0;background:#fff;border-block:1px solid var(--vl-line)}.vl-trust-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.75fr repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;align-items:stretch}.vl-trust-copy{color:var(--vl-muted);font-weight:800}.vl-trust-item{padding:18px;border-radius:20px;background:var(--vl-frost);color:var(--vl-navy);font-weight:850;text-align:center}.vl-services{background:#fff}.vl-section-head{display:flex;align-items:end;justify-content:space-between;gap:30px;margin-bottom:42px}.vl-section-head .vl-text{max-width:520px}.vl-service-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:18px}.vl-service-card{min-height:460px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.vl-service-card img{width:100%;height:245px;object-fit:cover}.vl-service-body{padding:24px}.vl-service-body h3{margin:0;font-size:24px;line-height:1.1}.vl-service-body p{margin:14px 0 0;color:var(--vl-muted)}
.vl-process{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f0f9ff,#fff)}.vl-process-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(170px,1fr));gap:14px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:8px}.vl-process-card{padding:16px;min-height:360px;background:#10243d;border-radius:28px;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(16,36,61,.18)}.vl-process-card img{width:100%;max-height:220px;object-fit:contain;margin:0 auto 12px}.vl-process-card h3{margin:0;font-size:20px}.vl-process-card p{margin:10px 0 0;color:#c7d8e7;font-size:14px}.vl-app{background:#10243d;color:#fff}.vl-app .vl-section-title,.vl-app .vl-eyebrow{color:#fff}.vl-app .vl-text{color:#c7d8e7}.vl-app-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.95fr) minmax(330px,.7fr);align-items:center;gap:60px}.vl-app-list{display:grid;gap:14px;margin-top:30px}.vl-app-point{padding:18px 20px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14)}.vl-app-point strong{display:block;color:#fff}.vl-app-point span{color:#c7d8e7}.vl-phone-wrap{position:relative;isolation:isolate;max-width:310px;margin:0 auto}.vl-phone-wrap:before{content:"";position:absolute;z-index:0;inset:12% -20%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(46,211,255,.34),transparent 62%)}.vl-phone-wrap img{position:relative;z-index:1;width:100%;filter:drop-shadow(0 30px 54px rgba(0,0,0,.38))}
.vl-coverage{background:#fff}.vl-coverage-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.8fr) minmax(430px,1fr);gap:28px;align-items:stretch}.vl-map-card{overflow:hidden;min-height:440px}.vl-live-map-card{position:relative;background:#dfeaf2}.vl-google-map{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:440px}.vl-google-map iframe{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;min-height:440px;border:0}.vl-map-route-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none}.vl-map-route-overlay svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}.vl-map-site-dot{position:absolute;width:22px;height:22px;margin:-11px 0 0 -11px;border-radius:999px;background:#176bff;border:3px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(18,36,58,.24)}.vl-map-site-dot:after{content:attr(data-index);position:absolute;inset:2px;display:grid;place-items:center;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:900}.vl-map-status{position:absolute;left:18px;right:18px;bottom:18px;z-index:2;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);box-shadow:0 14px 38px rgba(18,36,58,.16);color:var(--vl-navy);font-weight:800}.vl-map-status[hidden]{display:none}.vl-zone-list{display:grid;gap:14px;margin-top:28px}.vl-zone{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vl-line)}.vl-testimonials{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f7fbfd,#fff)}.vl-quote-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:18px}.vl-quote{padding:28px}.vl-quote p{margin:0;font-size:20px;color:#243143}.vl-person{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-top:24px}.vl-person img{width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}.vl-person strong{display:block}.vl-person span{color:var(--vl-muted);font-size:14px}.vl-faq{background:#fff}.vl-faq-list{display:grid;gap:12px;margin-top:38px}.vl-faq-item{padding:24px}.vl-faq-item h3{margin:0;font-size:22px}.vl-faq-item p{margin:12px 0 0;color:var(--vl-muted)}
.vl-form-section{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10243d,#176bff);color:#fff}.vl-form-section .vl-section-title,.vl-form-section .vl-eyebrow{color:#fff}.vl-form-section .vl-text{color:#dcecff}.vl-form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.85fr) minmax(420px,1fr);gap:34px;align-items:start}.vl-form-panel{padding:28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);color:var(--vl-ink);border-radius:30px;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}.vl-form-panel .df-form{display:grid;gap:18px}.vl-form-panel .df-section{display:grid;gap:16px}.vl-form-panel .df-section-title{margin:0;font-size:20px}.vl-form-panel .df-field{display:grid;gap:8px}.vl-form-panel .df-label{font-weight:800;color:var(--vl-navy)}.vl-form-panel .df-input,.vl-form-panel .df-textarea,.vl-form-panel .df-select,.vl-form-panel .df-customselect__trigger,.vl-form-panel .df-multiselect__trigger{width:100%;min-height:52px;border:1px solid var(--vl-line);border-radius:16px;padding:12px 14px;background:#f8fbfd;color:var(--vl-ink)}.vl-form-panel .df-btn{min-height:54px;border:0;border-radius:999px;padding:0 24px;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--vl-blue),#00a8ff);font-weight:850}
.vl-cta{padding:84px 0;background:#eaf7ff}.vl-cta-box{position:relative;isolation:isolate;overflow:hidden;padding:44px;color:#fff;background:#10243d;border-radius:34px}.vl-cta-box:after{content:"";position:absolute;z-index:0;inset:0 0 0 45%;background:url('/core/image/${MOUNTAIN_WASH_IMAGE@IMAGE}/get') center/cover no-repeat;opacity:.32}.vl-cta-content{position:relative;z-index:2;max-width:650px}.vl-footer{padding:46px 0;color:#d6e4f2;background:#081827}.vl-footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:22px;align-items:center}.vl-footer .vl-logo{color:#fff}.vl-footer-links{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;color:#d6e4f2;font-weight:700}
@media(max-width:980px){.vl-nav-links{display:none}.vl-hero{min-height:auto}.vl-hero-grid,.vl-app-grid,.vl-coverage-grid,.vl-form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.vl-hero-media{min-height:520px}.vl-service-grid,.vl-quote-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.vl-trust-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.vl-trust-copy{grid-column:1/-1}}
@media(max-width:640px){.vl-container{width:min(100% - 28px,var(--vl-container))}.vl-section{padding:68px 0}.vl-nav{min-height:58px;padding:8px 10px 8px 14px}.vl-header-actions .vl-button--secondary{display:none}.vl-hero{padding-top:112px}.vl-hero-actions,.vl-section-head{display:grid;align-items:start}.vl-hero-metrics{grid-template-columns:1fr}.vl-hero-media{min-height:390px}.vl-weather-pill{width:190px}.vl-hero-photo{inset:72px 0 0 0}.vl-loader-cutout{width:62%}.vl-trust-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}.vl-cta-box{padding:30px}.vl-cta-box:after{inset:45% 0 0}.vl-footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
</style>

value.en: SnowOps - Snow removal operations and winter services
A vertical landing page for commercial snow removal, dispatch, route visibility, and winter service requests.

en.NAME: Google Maps API key
en.DESCRIPTION: Browser key used to load the Google Maps JavaScript API for the live coverage map.

en.NAME: Dynamic form JavaScript asset
en.DESCRIPTION: Core MediaAsset containing the CMS dynamic FormType renderer.

value.en: Snow removal that stays ahead of the storm.
Dispatch crews, monitor routes, document site work, and keep commercial properties open through the worst winter events.

${SERVICE_3_TEXT@LOCALIZED_STRING_SS}

value.en: One winter program for every site type.
Structure your landing page around plowing, salting, sidewalk clearing, haul-away, inspections, and after-storm reporting.
Prioritized plow routes, live crew status, completion evidence, and exception handling.
Service plans for retail, office, and mixed-use sites with clear escalation windows.
Emergency dispatch for drifting snow, blocked docks, refreeze, and high-traffic entrances.
Pickup snow plow in residential street

value.en: From forecast to invoice without losing context.
Compact dark mobile cards echo the Figma flow while keeping every step editable in CMS.
Trigger work from weather thresholds and property priority.
Assign drivers, crews, vehicles, and equipment by route.
Give customers current ETA and completion status.
Capture photos, site notes, and exception reports.
Sync approved service records into billing workflows.

${APP_EYEBROW@LOCALIZED_STRING_SS}

value.en: Field updates shaped for cold, fast work.
Keep the phone view focused: today route, next site, hazards, proof photos, and workflow actions.
Drivers, crew, vehicle, and equipment can be supplied by typed attributes.
Property, address, instructions, and media remain reachable without crowding actions.
Actual start and finish come from workflow transitions and service history.

value.en: Show exactly where crews are ready.
Show a live Google Map centered on the browser location when available, with Richmond Hill, Ontario as the fallback.

value.en: Clear status for customers and operators.
We stopped chasing text messages during storms. Route status, site photos, and closeout notes are visible in one place.
The page converts because it explains the operational plan, not just the equipment list.

${FAQ_3_A@LOCALIZED_STRING_SS}

value.en: Can the service request form be changed?
Yes. The section mounts a CMS FormType, so fields come from Core metadata rather than hardcoded HTML.
Can images be replaced per organization?
Yes. All major visuals are IMAGE typed parameters and can be overridden in PageContext values.
Does this template assume one exact snow business?
No. Copy, CTAs, map, service cards, and FormType code are editable so the same layout can serve a vertical landing family.

value.en: Build the winter plan before the forecast turns.
The form below is rendered from a CMS FormType. Configure the fields in Core and keep this template focused on layout.

value.en: Turn storm response into a repeatable operation.
Publish a vertical page for each service territory, season, or customer segment without rebuilding the template.

value.en: Commercial snow removal, winter dispatch, and site service coordination.

en.NAME: Vertical Landing JTE
en.DESCRIPTION: Snow removal vertical landing template based on the Snow Removal Figma concept.
